title: Marian Ilitch: Detroit businesswoman, Tigers matriarch
text:
TIGERS

# Marian Ilitch: Detroit businesswoman, Tigers matriarch

March 26, 2026, 11:07 a.m. ET

Detroit Red Wings owner Marian Ilitch talks to some of her players during the public visitation of NHL Hall of Famer and former Detroit Red Wing Ted Lindsay at Little Caesars Arena home of the Detroit Red Wings on March 8, 2019 in Detroit, Michigan.

Pool, Getty Images Marian Ilitch of the Detroit Red Wings arrives for the 2008 NHL Awards at the Elgin Theatre on June 12, 2008 in Toronto, Ontario, Canada.

Bruce Bennett Team owners of the Detroit Red Wings Mike and Marian Ilitch hold the Stanley Cup trophy up over their heads during the Stanley Cup Finals game against the Washington Capitals at the MCI Center in Washington, D. C. on June 16, 1998. The Red Wings defeated the Capitals 4-1.

Robert Laberge, Getty Images Sergei Fedorov gives his thanks to Marian Ilitch, left, Chris Ilitch, right, during his jersey retirement ceremony at Little Caesars Arena in Detroit on Monday, Jan. 12, 2026.

Junfu Han, Junfu Han / USA TODAY NETWORK Via Imagn Images Michigan Gov. Rick Snyder, from left Marian Ilitch and Christopher Ilitch after cutting a ribbon during a ceremony to celebrate the opening of Little Caesars Arena in Detroit on Tuesday, September 5, 2017.

Romain Blanquart, Detroit Free Press Christopher Ilitch, Ken Holland, Marian Ilitch and new Detroit Red Wings GM Steve Yzerman after the press conference Friday, April 19, 2019 at Little Caesars Arena in Detroit, Mich.

Kirthmon F. Dozier, Detroit Free Press Detroit Red Wings owners Mike and Marian Ilitch walk the red carpet prior to the 2011 Hockey Hall of Fame Induction ceremony at the Hockey Hall Of Fame on November 14, 2011 in Toronto, Ontario, Canada.

Bruce Bennett, Getty Images Marian Ilitch, born January 7, 1933, was born in Dearborn and is most known for co-founding Little Caesars Pizza with her late husband Mike Ilitch.

KIMBERLY P. MITCHELL, Detroit Free Press Marian Ilitch, born January 7, 1933, was born in Dearborn and is most known for co-founding Little Caesars Pizza with her late husband Mike Ilitch.

Little Caesars Mike and Marian Ilitch address the media about celebrating the 50 year anniversary of Little Caesars Pizza in 2009 at the Fox Theatre in Detroit.

Rashaun Rucker, Detroit Free Press Marian Ilitch, born January 7, 1933, was born in Dearborn and is most known for co-founding Little Caesars Pizza with her late husband Mike Ilitch.

WILLIAM ARCHIE, Detroit Free Press Mike and Marian Ilitch are pictured at the groundbreaking for Comerica Park in October 1997.

Nico Toutenhoofd, Detroit Free Press Denise Ilitch, left, and her mom, Marian Ilitch, at the opening of Denise's restaurant 220 Merrill in Birmingham in July 2014.

Doug Ashley The -dfIlitch family after the purchase of the Detroit Red Wings in June of 1982.

PATRICIA BECK, Detroit Free Press The late Mike Ilitch and his wife, Marian, hold a news conference in the Fox in 1988.

Mary Schroeder, Detroit Free Press Marian Ilitch, left, stands with Ernie Harwell and her husband Mike Ilitch, right, enjoy a laugh during a reception for the Harwells in the new "Lulu and Ernie Harwell Collection" room at the Detroit Public Library in Detroit.

WILLIAM ARCHIE, Detroit Free Press Mike Ilitch and Marian Ilitch pose for photos after he was inducted into the Hockey Hall of Fame in Toronto November 3, 2003.

Kirthmon F. Dozier, Detroit Free Press Marian Ilitch, co-founder of Little Caesars Pizza, kisses her son Chris Ilitch, President and CEO of Ilitch Holdings, Inc. during the ceremonial ribbon cutting for the opening of the new Mike Ilitch School of Business at Wayne State University's downtown campus in Detroit on Tuesday, Aug. 21, 2018.

Kimberly P. Mitchell, Detroit Free Press Marian Ilitch, stands in front of the VIP valet entrance under the Motor City icon June 4, 2007.

REGINA H. BOONE, Detroit Free Press Marian Ilitch, born January 7, 1933, was born in Dearborn and is most known for co-founding Little Caesars Pizza with her late husband Mike Ilitch.

JULIAN H. GONZALEZ, Detroit Free Press Marian Ilitch, born January 7, 1933, was born in Dearborn and is most known for co-founding Little Caesars Pizza with her late husband Mike Ilitch.

Little Caesars Mike and Marian Ilitch with Sergei Fedorov in the locker room with the trophy they won for winning the Western Conference at Joe Louis Arena in Detroit on June 11, 1995.

Julian H. Gonzalez, Detroit Free Press Marian Ilitch, born January 7, 1933, was born in Dearborn and is most known for co-founding Little Caesars Pizza with her late husband Mike Ilitch.

Mary Schroeder, Detroit Free Press Christopher Ilitch and his mother Marian Ilitch make an emotional exit after a ceremony in remembrance of Mike Ilitch, before the Detroit Tigers face the Boston Red Sox on Opening Day, April 7, 2017 at Comerica Park in Detroit.

Mandi Wright, Detroit Free Press From left, Christopher Ilitch and Marian Ilitch listen as Mike Ilitch speaks during a 2015 press conference announcing their $40 million donation to build the Mike Ilitch School of Business at the McGregor Memorial Conference Center on the Wayne State University campus in Detroit.

Ryan Garza, Detroit Free Press
